summary: The footage captures a snowy road with several vehicles traveling in both directions. A snowplow truck is seen moving alongside a convoy of trucks, creating disturbances in the snow-covered lane.

events_timeline.event: Snowplow truck travels alongside a convoy of trucks, causing disturbances in the snow-covered lane.

uncertainties: Exact speed of the convoy trucks is unclear.
Disturbances caused by the snowplow truck may extend beyond the visible frames.

risk_assessment.why: The presence of multiple trucks traveling closely together in snowy conditions increases the risk of accidents due to reduced traction and potential collisions.
